revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{tsh|clre|rewrite}} {{High-use}} {{Never substitute}} This template should be used on articles which need so much cleanup that rewriting them completely may be necessary to comply with Wikipedia's guidelines on style and content. It is strongly encouraged that the editor adding the tag discuss the issue on the article's talk page, especially if the writing appears superficially acceptable. == Usage == To provide a reason for the needed rewrite, use: {{tnull|Cleanup rewrite|Reason for rewrite|article or section|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} {{Cleanup rewrite|Reason for rewrite|article or section}} To mark a section for rewrite without a reason, use: {{tnull|Cleanup rewrite|2{{=}}section|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} {{Cleanup rewrite|2=section}} To mark an article for rewrite without a reason, use: {{tnull|Cleanup rewrite|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} {{Cleanup rewrite}} This template adds tagged articles to [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing rewrite]]. == Tracking categories == * {{clc|All articles needing rewrite}} == Aliases == * [[Template:Section rewrite]] * [{{fullurl:Special:WhatLinksHere/Template:Cleanup_rewrite|hidetrans=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500}} Also known as...] (list of all redirects to this template that may also be used) == See also == {{Div col}} * [[Template:Citation style]] * [[:en:Template:Cleanup list|Template:Cleanup list]] * [[Template:Confusing]] * [[:en:Template:Context|Template:Context]] * [[Template:Copy edit]] * [[:en:Template:Fiction|Template:Fiction]] * [[Template:Globalize]] * [[Template:Notability]] * [[Template:Primary sources]] * [[Template:Rewriting]] * [[:en:Template:Self-contradictory|Template:Self-contradictory]] * [[Template:Technical]] * [[Template:Tone]] * [[Template:Uncategorized]] * [[Template:Underlinked]] * [[Template:Unreferenced]] {{Div col end}} * [[Wikipedia:Template index/Cleanup]] == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "Use this cleanup template to indicate that an article may need to be rewritten to comply with Wikipedia's quality standards.", "format": "inline", "params": { "date": { "label": "Month and year", "description": "The month and year that the template was placed (in full). \"May 2025\" inserts the current month and year automatically.", "type": "line", "autovalue": "May 2025", "example": "January 2013", "suggested": true }, "1": { "label": "Reason", "description": "The reason why the article may need to be rewritten", "type": "string", "example": "it is mostly incomprehensible" }, "section": { "label": "Section?", "description": "Enter \"yes\" here to replace the word \"article\" with \"section\".", "type": "line", "autovalue": "yes", "example": "yes" }, "2": { "label": "Affected area", "description": "Custom text to replace the word \"article\" in the template", "type": "line", "example": "section" }, "small": { "label": "Make template small", "description": "Enter \"left\" here to make the template box small and aligned to the left.", "type": "line", "autovalue": "left", "example": "left" } }, "paramOrder": [ "date", "1", "section", "2", "small" ] } {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Cleanup templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{tsh|clre|rewrite}} {{High-use}} {{Never substitute}} This template should be used on articles which need so much cleanup that rewriting them completely may be necessary to comply with Wikipedia's guidelines on style and content. It is strongly encouraged that the editor adding the tag discuss the issue on the article's talk page, especially if the writing appears superficially acceptable. == Usage == To provide a reason for the needed rewrite, use: {{tnull|Cleanup rewrite|Reason for rewrite|article or section|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} {{Cleanup rewrite|Reason for rewrite|article or section}} To mark a section for rewrite without a reason, use: {{tnull|Cleanup rewrite|2{{=}}section|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} {{Cleanup rewrite|2=section}} To mark an article for rewrite without a reason, use: {{tnull|Cleanup rewrite|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} {{Cleanup rewrite}} This template adds tagged articles to [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing rewrite]]. == Tracking categories == * {{clc|All articles needing rewrite}} == Aliases == * [[Template:Section rewrite]] * [{{fullurl:Special:WhatLinksHere/Template:Cleanup_rewrite|hidetrans=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500}} Also known as...] (list of all redirects to this template that may also be used) == See also == {{Div col}} * [[Template:Citation style]] * [[:en:Template:Cleanup list|Template:Cleanup list]] * [[Template:Confusing]] * [[:en:Template:Context|Template:Context]] * [[Template:Copy edit]] * [[:en:Template:Fiction|Template:Fiction]] * [[Template:Globalize]] * [[Template:Notability]] * [[Template:Primary sources]] * [[Template:Rewriting]] * [[:en:Template:Self-contradictory|Template:Self-contradictory]] * [[Template:Technical]] * [[Template:Tone]] * [[Template:Uncategorized]] * [[Template:Underlinked]] * [[Template:Unreferenced]] {{Div col end}} * [[Wikipedia:Template index/Cleanup]] == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "Use this cleanup template to indicate that an article may need to be rewritten to comply with Wikipedia's quality standards.", "format": "inline", "params": { "date": { "label": "Month and year", "description": "The month and year that the template was placed (in full). \"May 2025\" inserts the current month and year automatically.", "type": "line", "autovalue": "May 2025", "example": "January 2013", "suggested": true }, "1": { "label": "Reason", "description": "The reason why the article may need to be rewritten", "type": "string", "example": "it is mostly incomprehensible" }, "section": { "label": "Section?", "description": "Enter \"yes\" here to replace the word \"article\" with \"section\".", "type": "line", "autovalue": "yes", "example": "yes" }, "2": { "label": "Affected area", "description": "Custom text to replace the word \"article\" in the template", "type": "line", "example": "section" }, "small": { "label": "Make template small", "description": "Enter \"left\" here to make the template box small and aligned to the left.", "type": "line", "autovalue": "left", "example": "left" } }, "paramOrder": [ "date", "1", "section", "2", "small" ] } {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Cleanup templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

{{Documentation subpage}} {{tsh|clre|rewrite}} {{High-use}} {{Never substitute}} This template should be used on articles which need so much cleanup that rewriting them completely may be necessary to comply with Wikipedia's guidelines on style and content. It is strongly encouraged that the editor adding the tag discuss the issue on the article's talk page, especially if the writing appears superficially acceptable. == Usage == To provide a reason for the needed rewrite, use: {{tnull|Cleanup rewrite|Reason for rewrite|article or section|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} {{Cleanup rewrite|Reason for rewrite|article or section}} To mark a section for rewrite without a reason, use: {{tnull|Cleanup rewrite|2{{=}}section|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} {{Cleanup rewrite|2=section}} To mark an article for rewrite without a reason, use: {{tnull|Cleanup rewrite|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} {{Cleanup rewrite}} This template adds tagged articles to [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing rewrite]]. == Tracking categories == * {{clc|All articles needing rewrite}} == Aliases == * [[Template:Section rewrite]] * [{{fullurl:Special:WhatLinksHere/Template:Cleanup_rewrite|hidetrans=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500}} Also known as...] (list of all redirects to this template that may also be used) == See also == {{Div col}} * [[Template:Citation style]] * [[:en:Template:Cleanup list|Template:Cleanup list]] * [[Template:Confusing]] * [[:en:Template:Context|Template:Context]] * [[Template:Copy edit]] * [[:en:Template:Fiction|Template:Fiction]] * [[Template:Globalize]] * [[Template:Notability]] * [[Template:Primary sources]] * [[Template:Rewriting]] * [[:en:Template:Self-contradictory|Template:Self-contradictory]] * [[Template:Technical]] * [[Template:Tone]] * [[Template:Uncategorized]] * [[Template:Underlinked]] * [[Template:Unreferenced]] {{Div col end}} * [[Wikipedia:Template index/Cleanup]] == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "Use this cleanup template to indicate that an article may need to be rewritten to comply with Wikipedia's quality standards.", "format": "inline", "params": { "date": { "label": "Month and year", "description": "The month and year that the template was placed (in full). \"May 2025\" inserts the current month and year automatically.", "type": "line", "autovalue": "May 2025", "example": "January 2013", "suggested": true }, "1": { "label": "Reason", "description": "The reason why the article may need to be rewritten", "type": "string", "example": "it is mostly incomprehensible" }, "section": { "label": "Section?", "description": "Enter \"yes\" here to replace the word \"article\" with \"section\".", "type": "line", "autovalue": "yes", "example": "yes" }, "2": { "label": "Affected area", "description": "Custom text to replace the word \"article\" in the template", "type": "line", "example": "section" }, "small": { "label": "Make template small", "description": "Enter \"left\" here to make the template box small and aligned to the left.", "type": "line", "autovalue": "left", "example": "left" } }, "paramOrder": [ "date", "1", "section", "2", "small" ] } {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Cleanup templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{tsh|clre|rewrite}} {{High-use}} {{Never substitute}} This template should be used on articles which need so much cleanup that rewriting them completely may be necessary to comply with Wikipedia's guidelines on style and content. It is strongly encouraged that the editor adding the tag discuss the issue on the article's talk page, especially if the writing appears superficially acceptable. == Usage == To provide a reason for the needed rewrite, use: {{tnull|Cleanup rewrite|Reason for rewrite|article or section|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} {{Cleanup rewrite|Reason for rewrite|article or section}} To mark a section for rewrite without a reason, use: {{tnull|Cleanup rewrite|2{{=}}section|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} {{Cleanup rewrite|2=section}} To mark an article for rewrite without a reason, use: {{tnull|Cleanup rewrite|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} {{Cleanup rewrite}} This template adds tagged articles to [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing rewrite]]. == Tracking categories == * {{clc|All articles needing rewrite}} == Aliases == * [[Template:Section rewrite]] * [{{fullurl:Special:WhatLinksHere/Template:Cleanup_rewrite|hidetrans=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500}} Also known as...] (list of all redirects to this template that may also be used) == See also == {{Div col}} * [[Template:Citation style]] * [[:en:Template:Cleanup list|Template:Cleanup list]] * [[Template:Confusing]] * [[:en:Template:Context|Template:Context]] * [[Template:Copy edit]] * [[:en:Template:Fiction|Template:Fiction]] * [[Template:Globalize]] * [[Template:Notability]] * [[Template:Primary sources]] * [[Template:Rewriting]] * [[:en:Template:Self-contradictory|Template:Self-contradictory]] * [[Template:Technical]] * [[Template:Tone]] * [[Template:Uncategorized]] * [[Template:Underlinked]] * [[Template:Unreferenced]] {{Div col end}} * [[Wikipedia:Template index/Cleanup]] == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "Use this cleanup template to indicate that an article may need to be rewritten to comply with Wikipedia's quality standards.", "format": "inline", "params": { "date": { "label": "Month and year", "description": "The month and year that the template was placed (in full). \"May 2025\" inserts the current month and year automatically.", "type": "line", "autovalue": "May 2025", "example": "January 2013", "suggested": true }, "1": { "label": "Reason", "description": "The reason why the article may need to be rewritten", "type": "string", "example": "it is mostly incomprehensible" }, "section": { "label": "Section?", "description": "Enter \"yes\" here to replace the word \"article\" with \"section\".", "type": "line", "autovalue": "yes", "example": "yes" }, "2": { "label": "Affected area", "description": "Custom text to replace the word \"article\" in the template", "type": "line", "example": "section" }, "small": { "label": "Make template small", "description": "Enter \"left\" here to make the template box small and aligned to the left.", "type": "line", "autovalue": "left", "example": "left" } }, "paramOrder": [ "date", "1", "section", "2", "small" ] } {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Cleanup templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{tsh|clre|rewrite}} {{High-use}} {{Never substitute}} This template should be used on articles which need so much cleanup that rewriting them completely may be necessary to comply with Wikipedia's guidelines on style and content. It is strongly encouraged that the editor adding the tag discuss the issue on the article's talk page, especially if the writing appears superficially acceptable. == Usage == To provide a reason for the needed rewrite, use: {{tnull|Cleanup rewrite|Reason for rewrite|article or section|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} {{Cleanup rewrite|Reason for rewrite|article or section}} To mark a section for rewrite without a reason, use: {{tnull|Cleanup rewrite|2{{=}}section|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} {{Cleanup rewrite|2=section}} To mark an article for rewrite without a reason, use: {{tnull|Cleanup rewrite|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} {{Cleanup rewrite}} This template adds tagged articles to [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing rewrite]]. == Tracking categories == * {{clc|All articles needing rewrite}} == Aliases == * [[Template:Section rewrite]] * [{{fullurl:Special:WhatLinksHere/Template:Cleanup_rewrite|hidetrans=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500}} Also known as...] (list of all redirects to this template that may also be used) == See also == {{Div col}} * [[Template:Citation style]] * [[:en:Template:Cleanup list|Template:Cleanup list]] * [[Template:Confusing]] * [[:en:Template:Context|Template:Context]] * [[Template:Copy edit]] * [[:en:Template:Fiction|Template:Fiction]] * [[Template:Globalize]] * [[Template:Notability]] * [[Template:Primary sources]] * [[Template:Rewriting]] * [[:en:Template:Self-contradictory|Template:Self-contradictory]] * [[Template:Technical]] * [[Template:Tone]] * [[Template:Uncategorized]] * [[Template:Underlinked]] * [[Template:Unreferenced]] {{Div col end}} * [[Wikipedia:Template index/Cleanup]] == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "Use this cleanup template to indicate that an article may need to be rewritten to comply with Wikipedia's quality standards.", "format": "inline", "params": { "date": { "label": "Month and year", "description": "The month and year that the template was placed (in full). \"May 2025\" inserts the current month and year automatically.", "type": "line", "autovalue": "May 2025", "example": "January 2013", "suggested": true }, "1": { "label": "Reason", "description": "The reason why the article may need to be rewritten", "type": "string", "example": "it is mostly incomprehensible" }, "section": { "label": "Section?", "description": "Enter \"yes\" here to replace the word \"article\" with \"section\".", "type": "line", "autovalue": "yes", "example": "yes" }, "2": { "label": "Affected area", "description": "Custom text to replace the word \"article\" in the template", "type": "line", "example": "section" }, "small": { "label": "Make template small", "description": "Enter \"left\" here to make the template box small and aligned to the left.", "type": "line", "autovalue": "left", "example": "left" } }, "paramOrder": [ "date", "1", "section", "2", "small" ] } {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Cleanup templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23176857634|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{tsh|clre|rewrite}} {{High-use}} {{Never substitute}} This template should be used on articles which need so much cleanup that rewriting them completely may be necessary to comply with Wikipedia's guidelines on style and content. It is strongly encouraged that the editor adding the tag discuss the issue on the article's talk page, especially if the writing appears superficially acceptable. == Usage == To provide a reason for the needed rewrite, use: {{tnull|Cleanup rewrite|Reason for rewrite|article or section|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} {{Cleanup rewrite|Reason for rewrite|article or section}} To mark a section for rewrite without a reason, use: {{tnull|Cleanup rewrite|2{{=}}section|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} {{Cleanup rewrite|2=section}} To mark an article for rewrite without a reason, use: {{tnull|Cleanup rewrite|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} {{Cleanup rewrite}} This template adds tagged articles to [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing rewrite]]. == Tracking categories == * {{clc|All articles needing rewrite}} == Aliases == * [[Template:Section rewrite]] * [{{fullurl:Special:WhatLinksHere/Template:Cleanup_rewrite|hidetrans=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500}} Also known as...] (list of all redirects to this template that may also be used) == See also == {{Div col}} * [[Template:Citation style]] * [[:en:Template:Cleanup list|Template:Cleanup list]] * [[Template:Confusing]] * [[:en:Template:Context|Template:Context]] * [[Template:Copy edit]] * [[:en:Template:Fiction|Template:Fiction]] * [[Template:Globalize]] * [[Template:Notability]] * [[Template:Primary sources]] * [[Template:Rewriting]] * [[:en:Template:Self-contradictory|Template:Self-contradictory]] * [[Template:Technical]] * [[Template:Tone]] * [[Template:Uncategorized]] * [[Template:Underlinked]] * [[Template:Unreferenced]] {{Div col end}} * [[Wikipedia:Template index/Cleanup]] == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "Use this cleanup template to indicate that an article may need to be rewritten to comply with Wikipedia's quality standards.", "format": "inline", "params": { "date": { "label": "Month and year", "description": "The month and year that the template was placed (in full). \"May 2025\" inserts the current month and year automatically.", "type": "line", "autovalue": "May 2025", "example": "January 2013", "suggested": true }, "1": { "label": "Reason", "description": "The reason why the article may need to be rewritten", "type": "string", "example": "it is mostly incomprehensible" }, "section": { "label": "Section?", "description": "Enter \"yes\" here to replace the word \"article\" with \"section\".", "type": "line", "autovalue": "yes", "example": "yes" }, "2": { "label": "Affected area", "description": "Custom text to replace the word \"article\" in the template", "type": "line", "example": "section" }, "small": { "label": "Make template small", "description": "Enter \"left\" here to make the template box small and aligned to the left.", "type": "line", "autovalue": "left", "example": "left" } }, "paramOrder": [ "date", "1", "section", "2", "small" ] } {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Cleanup templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{Documentation subpage}} {{tsh|clre|rewrite}} {{High-use}} {{Never substitute}} This template should be used on articles which need so much cleanup that rewriting them completely may be necessary to comply with Wikipedia's guidelines on style and content. It is strongly encouraged that the editor adding the tag discuss the issue on the article's talk page, especially if the writing appears superficially acceptable. == Usage == To provide a reason for the needed rewrite, use: {{tnull|Cleanup rewrite|Reason for rewrite|article or section|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} {{Cleanup rewrite|Reason for rewrite|article or section}} To mark a section for rewrite without a reason, use: {{tnull|Cleanup rewrite|2{{=}}section|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} {{Cleanup rewrite|2=section}} To mark an article for rewrite without a reason, use: {{tnull|Cleanup rewrite|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} {{Cleanup rewrite}} This template adds tagged articles to [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing rewrite]]. == Tracking categories == * {{clc|All articles needing rewrite}} == Aliases == * [[Template:Section rewrite]] * [{{fullurl:Special:WhatLinksHere/Template:Cleanup_rewrite|hidetrans=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500}} Also known as...] (list of all redirects to this template that may also be used) == See also == {{Div col}} * [[Template:Citation style]] * [[:en:Template:Cleanup list|Template:Cleanup list]] * [[Template:Confusing]] * [[:en:Template:Context|Template:Context]] * [[Template:Copy edit]] * [[:en:Template:Fiction|Template:Fiction]] * [[Template:Globalize]] * [[Template:Notability]] * [[Template:Primary sources]] * [[Template:Rewriting]] * [[:en:Template:Self-contradictory|Template:Self-contradictory]] * [[Template:Technical]] * [[Template:Tone]] * [[Template:Uncategorized]] * [[Template:Underlinked]] * [[Template:Unreferenced]] {{Div col end}} * [[Wikipedia:Template index/Cleanup]] == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "Use this cleanup template to indicate that an article may need to be rewritten to comply with Wikipedia's quality standards.", "format": "inline", "params": { "date": { "label": "Month and year", "description": "The month and year that the template was placed (in full). \"May 2025\" inserts the current month and year automatically.", "type": "line", "autovalue": "May 2025", "example": "January 2013", "suggested": true }, "1": { "label": "Reason", "description": "The reason why the article may need to be rewritten", "type": "string", "example": "it is mostly incomprehensible" }, "section": { "label": "Section?", "description": "Enter \"yes\" here to replace the word \"article\" with \"section\".", "type": "line", "autovalue": "yes", "example": "yes" }, "2": { "label": "Affected area", "description": "Custom text to replace the word \"article\" in the template", "type": "line", "example": "section" }, "small": { "label": "Make template small", "description": "Enter \"left\" here to make the template box small and aligned to the left.", "type": "line", "autovalue": "left", "example": "left" } }, "paramOrder": [ "date", "1", "section", "2", "small" ] } {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Cleanup templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cleanup_rewrite%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{tsh|clre|rewrite}} {{High-use}} {{Never substitute}} This template should be used on articles which need so much cleanup that rewriting them completely may be necessary to comply with Wikipedia's guidelines on style and content. It is strongly encouraged that the editor adding the tag discuss the issue on the article's talk page, especially if the writing appears superficially acceptable. == Usage == To provide a reason for the needed rewrite, use: {{tnull|Cleanup rewrite|Reason for rewrite|article or section|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} {{Cleanup rewrite|Reason for rewrite|article or section}} To mark a section for rewrite without a reason, use: {{tnull|Cleanup rewrite|2{{=}}section|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} {{Cleanup rewrite|2=section}} To mark an article for rewrite without a reason, use: {{tnull|Cleanup rewrite|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} {{Cleanup rewrite}} This template adds tagged articles to [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing rewrite]]. == Tracking categories == * {{clc|All articles needing rewrite}} == Aliases == * [[Template:Section rewrite]] * [{{fullurl:Special:WhatLinksHere/Template:Cleanup_rewrite|hidetrans=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500}} Also known as...] (list of all redirects to this template that may also be used) == See also == {{Div col}} * [[Template:Citation style]] * [[:en:Template:Cleanup list|Template:Cleanup list]] * [[Template:Confusing]] * [[:en:Template:Context|Template:Context]] * [[Template:Copy edit]] * [[:en:Template:Fiction|Template:Fiction]] * [[Template:Globalize]] * [[Template:Notability]] * [[Template:Primary sources]] * [[Template:Rewriting]] * [[:en:Template:Self-contradictory|Template:Self-contradictory]] * [[Template:Technical]] * [[Template:Tone]] * [[Template:Uncategorized]] * [[Template:Underlinked]] * [[Template:Unreferenced]] {{Div col end}} * [[Wikipedia:Template index/Cleanup]] == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "Use this cleanup template to indicate that an article may need to be rewritten to comply with Wikipedia's quality standards.", "format": "inline", "params": { "date": { "label": "Month and year", "description": "The month and year that the template was placed (in full). \"May 2025\" inserts the current month and year automatically.", "type": "line", "autovalue": "May 2025", "example": "January 2013", "suggested": true }, "1": { "label": "Reason", "description": "The reason why the article may need to be rewritten", "type": "string", "example": "it is mostly incomprehensible" }, "section": { "label": "Section?", "description": "Enter \"yes\" here to replace the word \"article\" with \"section\".", "type": "line", "autovalue": "yes", "example": "yes" }, "2": { "label": "Affected area", "description": "Custom text to replace the word \"article\" in the template", "type": "line", "example": "section" }, "small": { "label": "Make template small", "description": "Enter \"left\" here to make the template box small and aligned to the left.", "type": "line", "autovalue": "left", "example": "left" } }, "paramOrder": [ "date", "1", "section", "2", "small" ] } {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Cleanup templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
